rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"When a task specifies exact verbatim text (e.g. a one-line note), the plan and implementation must reproduce that exact string — substituting with a semantically similar but different wording causes t","scope":"task execution"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A plan that deviates from the task's exact wording (even for a simple one-line insert) creates a mismatch that will fail automated review checks.","scope":"task/payload review"}]}
